styles: .business-text { padding: 0; margin: 0; height: 100%; } .sbc-metric-tabs { height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0 0 0 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; } .sbc-metric-tabs__group { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; height: 38px; padding: 0 8px; background: #F1F5F9; border-radius: 8px; } .sbc-metric-tabs__tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 30px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 6px; color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; } .sbc-metric-tabs__tab--active { background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F5EA8; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); } .sbc-metric-tabs__delta { color: #10B981; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; white-space: nowrap; padding-right: 6px; }
